symbols.name: RepositoryOutboxDomainEventBehavior
symbols.summary: Decorates a repository so domain events raised by aggregates are stored in the Entity Framework outbox.

syntax.content: public class RepositoryOutboxDomainEventBehavior : IGenericRepository, IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity, IAggregateRoot where TContext : DbContext, IOutboxDomainEventContext

public RepositoryOutboxDomainEventBehavior(ILoggerFactory loggerFactory, TContext context, IGenericRepository inner, IOutboxDomainEventQueue eventQueue = null, OutboxDomainEventOptions options = null)

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities in the repository by applying the specified property assignments in a set-based operation.

parameters.description: The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.

A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains a single entity of type TEntity if found; otherwise, null.
